name: A bustling shopping street
description:
You are standing on a platform above the ground that serves as one of the main
streets in Caras Galadon.  People stream by you on both sides, but not many
seem to be stopping at all.  No one seems eager to spend money on the sorts of
items sold along this street in the middle of a siege!  To the south a flet
that used to be a furniture store is closed, and an apparently abandoned music
store is to the north.
